creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This has to be the most beautiful and unique coffee cup in London 💕🌸 Featuring hand drawn illustrations of iconic London landmarks that change as you spin the cup!

Find it at @cream.dream_london and get it when you order the “London Summer Coffee”, which is Earl Grey milk, espresso and strawberry puree 🍓☕️

📍 46 Bedford St, London WC2E 9HA
